title: Graduate labour market statistics: 2024
body: "These statistics show labour market conditions for the following groups living in England:   graduates postgraduates non-graduates   This release also sets out a breakdown of graduate outcomes by different subcategories, such as gender.  Please contact us with any feedback.   Higher education analysis     Email HE.statistics@education.gov.uk        "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
